risks.description: xAI API rate limits or downtime prevents content generation
risks.mitigation: Implement retry with exponential backoff; cache fallback content; support multiple LLM providers

risks.description: AdSense approval delayed or denied for AI-generated content
risks.mitigation: Apply early; ensure content quality; prepare alternative ad networks (Media.net, Carbon Ads)

risks.description: VPS cost exceeds ad revenue during early growth phase
risks.mitigation: Start with minimal VPS ($5/mo); use Cloudflare for CDN/caching; monitor cost vs revenue ratio

risks.description: Generated content quality varies; some days may produce poor output
risks.mitigation: Implement content quality scoring; A/B test themes; maintain curated theme list; human review option

risks.description: AI-generated content may inadvertently include copyrighted or inappropriate material
risks.mitigation: Add content safety filters; include AI disclosure; implement content review pipeline

recommendation: Proceed with Phase 2 implementation. Key mitigations should be built into the pipeline from day one.
